title: Mantis
tmdbOverview: The secret society of contract killers falls into chaos, unleashing a new breed of assassins. With old rules in ruins, who dares claim the shadows?
synopsis: Mantis is a 2025 action, crime and thriller film from South Korea. It has a 5.3 rating on IMDb. A standout of 2020s cinema, it earns its spot on our lists. It carries a R certification (US rating system) — see the film's page for parental details.
